charter:
[idle-expansion #1] Inspect VISION.md, ROADMAP.md, SYSTEM_SPEC.md, and current project state.
Derive the next concrete increment as a new intake intent with charter + acceptance_contract + priority.
If ALL vision goals are genuinely exhausted, declare vision_exhausted with per-heading classification.

CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT modify .planning/VISION.md (human-owned, read-only).
- ROADMAP.md and SYSTEM_SPEC.md may be updated as supporting evidence.
- Every proposed intent MUST cite at least one VISION.md heading from the snapshot below.
- Output MUST be a structured idle_expansion_result (new_intake_intent or vision_exhausted).

VISION headings snapshot:
  - Vision for tusq.dev
  - Mission
  - The fight
  - The promise
  - What tusq.dev does
  - The core insight
  - The canonical artifact
  - Why we move fast
  - Why wide works for us
  - Coherence is expensive, implementation is cheaper than before
  - Wide OSS compounds faster than narrow OSS
  - Breadth turns into retention
  - The guardrails on width
  - Design principles
  - Velocity over surface area
  - Reviewable over opaque
  - Explicit side effects
  - Self-hostable or it does not ship
  - Plugins are how we scale
  - Product modules
  - The full transition we automate
  - Capability discovery and normalization
  - Auth and permission mapping
  - Data and schema understanding
  - Runtime instrumentation
  - Safe execution wrappers
  - Skill and agent composition
  - AI-facing interface generation
  - Eval and regression infrastructure
  - Documentation and adoption surfaces
  - Migration and rollout tooling
  - Governance and review workflows
  - Competitive transition intelligence
  - Roadmap shape: V1, V2, V3
  - Must-have in V1
  - High-leverage in V2
  - Moat features in V3
  - Who this is for
  - Why open source
  - What we resist
  - Vision for maturity
  - Relationship to tusq.cloud
  - Final statement

Source manifest:
  - .planning/VISION.md (19 headings, 19041 bytes)
  - .planning/ROADMAP.md (4 headings, 62174 bytes)
  - .planning/SYSTEM_SPEC.md (18 headings, 214957 bytes, warning: exceeds_64kb)
acceptance_contract: Produces a structured idle_expansion_result with kind "new_intake_intent" or "vision_exhausted".
If new_intake_intent: contains charter, acceptance_contract (array), priority, and vision_traceability citing snapshot headings.
If vision_exhausted: contains per-heading classification covering all snapshot headings.

vision_headings_snapshot: Coherence is expensive, implementation is cheaper than before
Wide OSS compounds faster than narrow OSS
Self-hostable or it does not ship
